case_title: JEREMIAH LOWERY VS. TANA MARIE RECACHO

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LOWERY, JEREMIAH MAILED TO RESPONDENT RECACHO, TANA MARIE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOWERY, JEREMIAH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00) SERVED OCT-23-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RECACHO, TANA MARIE
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JAN-09-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-09-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2014 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 11/21/2013 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $390.11 FILED BY RECACHO, TANA MARIE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LOWERY, JEREMIAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DEBORAH DANILOFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2013 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT RECACHO, TANA MARIE TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT LOWERY, JEREMIAH JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF TANA MARIE RECACHO AND AGAINST JEREMIAH LOWERY; TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $0.00; CROSS-CLAIMS JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF TANA MARIE RECACHO AND AGAINST JEREMIAH LOWERY IN THE AMOUNT OF: $390.11 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COST, TOTAL CROSS-CLAIM JUDGMENT $485.11. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 11/21/2013. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY RECACHO, TANA MARIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DEBORAH DANILOFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOWERY, JEREMIAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RECACHO, TANA MARIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED NOV-08-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LOWERY, JEREMIAH
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DEBORAH DANILOFF. FILED BY LOWERY, JEREMIAH RECACHO, TANA MARIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT RECACHO, TANA MARIE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LOWERY, JEREMIAH $390.11 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $455.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:46AM
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Jean Kong, not reported, D525.
Cause Called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant,Jeremiah Lowery, no appearances; Respondent, Tana Maire Recacho, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and rewpond to questions from Judge Myles.
Judge Myles informed respondent, Tana that the appellant did not appear to the court and there is cross-claims therefore, his judgment would be in favor of respondent as of the lower court judgment.

9:47am
matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Judgment Entered
